query_title: Mollo tutto e apro un chiringuito

recommendations.title: The Duel
recommendations.overview: Ernesto lives in depression and decides to hire a hit-man to end his own life. However, his plan takes an unexpected turn when he meets Rita, whose love gives him a new reason to live.

recommendations.title: In a Relationship
recommendations.overview: Long-term couple Owen and Hallie are breaking up—or maybe not?—and just as their relationship reaches a turning point, Matt and Willa embark on a romance of their own.

recommendations.title: Friends with Kids
recommendations.overview: In the wake of their friends' marriages and eventual offspring, longtime pals Julie and Jason decide to have a child together without becoming a couple. By becoming "time-share" parents, they reason, they can experience the joys of parenthood without

recommendations.title: Twin Sitters
recommendations.overview: An evil business executive is releasing dangerous toxins and the Barbarian Brothers set out to stop his evil work.

recommendations.title: Ma che bella sorpresa
recommendations.overview: High school professor Guido is a hopeless romantic whose life falls apart after his girlfriend leaves him. Paolo, a former student of his, helps him in getting out of his depression for a better chance to become a PE teacher himself.

recommendations.title: Crazy About Work
recommendations.overview: Alicia is a workaholic executive who suddenly loses her job and her family. In her process of rebuilding, she associates with a neighbor and helps her in her business. This is how she manages to be the most successful businesswoman in the country. Du

recommendations.title: Cheaper by the Dozen
recommendations.overview: This remake of the beloved classic follows the raucous exploits of a blended family of 12, the Bakers, as they navigate a hectic home life while simultaneously managing their family business.

recommendations.title: The Breaker Upperers
recommendations.overview: Two women run a business breaking up couples for cash but when one develops a conscience their friendship unravels.

recommendations.title: Scooby Goes Hollywood
recommendations.overview: Shaggy and Scooby-Doo quit their Saturday morning TV series in pursuit of Hollywood stardom.

recommendations.title: Unfinished Business
